Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:35am
Judge James Robertson, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 502:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Current Media, Inc., appearing through David Harleston; Respondent, Ken Light, appearing in Pro Per. Also appearing with Appellant, as witnesses are Justin Kline and James Robinson. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Robertson.
